adapterBoundary.policy: Thin plugin, hook, MCP, and agent-host adapters can be the product boundary; keep them unless host registration proof says they are redundant.

gainHonesty.policy: Benchmark impact is not a current-repo savings claim without a matched baseline.

hardwareCalibration.policy: Hardware, sensors, clocks, timing, and physical devices need calibration or tuning proof before simplification.

oneRunnableCheck.policy: Non-trivial new logic should leave one smallest runnable check; trivial one-liners do not need ceremony.

requestedExplanation.policy: Explicitly requested reports, walkthroughs, phase notes, and rationale are not clutter.

shortcutDebt.policy: Intentional lean shortcuts need a ceiling and upgrade trigger.

evidence.snippet: debug-only banner with no referenced call site

findings.proofGuidance: Run search for the banner symbol and one UI smoke check before deleting the file.
findings.recommendation: Delete the unused debug banner only after call-site search and smoke proof show it is not product behavior.

evidence.snippet: manual query splitting around a platform URL component

findings.proofGuidance: Add repeated-key, empty-value, and percent-encoding checks before replacing the helper.
findings.recommendation: Try a native URL components parser before keeping the custom helper.

evidence.snippet: restore, denied, and active entitlement decisions before feature unlock

findings.proofGuidance: Keep the gate until purchase, restore, denied, and expired entitlement behavior is proven before and after any cleanup.
findings.recommendation: Do not delete subscription entitlement logic from a less-code signal alone.

evidence.snippet: legacy migration branch with no current fixture proving migrated users are gone

findings.proofGuidance: Attach call-site search plus a migration fixture before deleting the bridge.
findings.recommendation: Mark the migration bridge proof-blocked until user-state compatibility is proven.

expectedAssertions: report-quality preserves the solo-developer deletion-usefulness question in JSON and Markdown
the fixture exposes behaviorGates in JSON and Behavior Gates in Markdown
the fixture separates delete, simplify, keep, and proof-blocked lanes
the fixture keeps scopeBoundary.shipguardOnly and targetAppsReadOnly explicit
shareable output contains no local absolute paths or private app identifiers
fixtureCandidate.privateDataPolicy: This promoted fixture is synthetic. Use source reports only to choose report shape; do not copy private app code, local paths, screenshots, app-specific identifiers, or proprietary text.
fixtureCandidate.sourceQuestion: Does the report help a solo developer delete clutter without deleting product behavior?

actionGroups.firstExperiment: Prove the debug banner has no call sites, then delete only that file in the first cleanup pass.
actionGroups.stopCondition: Stop if search finds a runtime route, preview, test, or support workflow that still references the banner.
actionGroups.validationRoute: Run symbol search and one UI smoke check before accepting the deletion.

actionGroups.firstExperiment: Replace only the query flag helper with the platform URL parser behind focused parser tests.
actionGroups.stopCondition: Stop if repeated keys, empty values, or percent encoding behave differently.
actionGroups.validationRoute: Run parser checks for repeated keys, empty values, ordering, and encoding.

actionGroups.firstExperiment: Leave the entitlement gate untouched and document the proof required before any cleanup.
actionGroups.stopCondition: Stop if purchase, restore, denied, or expired entitlement proof is missing.
actionGroups.validationRoute: Require focused entitlement behavior checks before simplification.

actionGroups.firstExperiment: Search migration call sites and add a synthetic migrated-user fixture before touching the bridge.
actionGroups.stopCondition: Stop if migrated-user state, call-site search, or rollback proof is missing.
actionGroups.validationRoute: Run call-site search plus a migration fixture before any deletion.

blockedByProof.action: Do not delete the migration bridge until migrated-user compatibility is proven.
blockedByProof.proofRequired: Attach call-site search plus a migrated-user fixture.

deleteList.action: Delete the unused debug banner after call-site search and UI smoke proof.
deleteList.proofRequired: Run symbol search and one UI smoke check.

keepList.proofRequired: Require purchase, restore, denied, and expired entitlement proof before cleanup.
keepList.reason: Entitlement gates are product behavior, not clutter.

simplifyFirst.action: Try URLComponents after focused parser equivalence tests.
simplifyFirst.proofRequired: Add checks for repeated keys, empty values, ordering, and encoding.

topActions.action: Delete the unused debug banner after call-site search and UI smoke proof.
topActions.proofRequired: Run symbol search and one UI smoke check.

topActions.action: Try URLComponents after focused parser equivalence tests.
topActions.proofRequired: Add checks for repeated keys, empty values, ordering, and encoding.

reportQualityQuestions: Does the report help a solo developer delete clutter without deleting product behavior?

scanScope.note: Synthetic fixture; no private source tree was scanned.

scopeBoundary.purpose: Synthetic public fixture for ShipGuard report-quality behavior.
